notes: CHOPPY - Fed crushed rate cut hopes early in the year. No clear direction, whipsaw price action. Stayed light and paid for it on a few stop-outs.
BULLISH - Fed confirmed 3 rate cuts coming in 2024. Market trended up clean, focused on long setups near key support levels and let winners run.
BULLISH - ES broke to new highs after tame CPI data. Consistent execution all month, high-probability setups with clear follow-through.
CHOPPY - Inflation came in hotter than expected at 3.5%. Rate cut hopes faded, market had no direction. Reduced size and stayed selective.
BULLISH - Rate cut narrative back on the table. Clean trending price action, stuck to morning sessions and avoided the choppy afternoon tape.
BULLISH - Steady grind higher. Focused on pullback entries near VWAP and key levels. Nothing flashy, just consistent execution.
BULLISH - Inflation cooled, ES broke to all-time highs and trended up the entire month. Most active month of the year, high conviction on long setups.
BEARISH - Japan yen carry trade collapsed. Nikkei dropped 12% in one day, ES gapped down 100 points, VIX hit 65. Nearly sat the whole month out, still got clipped.
BULLISH - Market stabilized after August chaos. Fed rate cut in September added fuel. Returned to normal execution, setups were clean again.
BULLISH - Strong earnings season and pre-election optimism kept ES bid. Stayed disciplined, no revenge trading after a tough August.
BULLISH - Trump won the election. Markets ripped on deregulation and tax cut expectations. Clean one-directional move, long-bias all month.
CHOPPY - Fed cut rates but signaled only 2 cuts in 2025 instead of 4. ES dropped 3% on Fed day. Rest of month was dead holiday chop, traded very light.
FLAT - Inflation stayed sticky, Fed pause fears returned. Light directionless month, mostly scratches. Preserved capital and waited for better conditions.
BULLISH - Market found footing and trended higher. Focused on long setups with clear structure, good follow-through on most trades.
BEARISH - Trump tariff threats started escalating. Market gapped down on every headline with no clean bounces. Took only 6 trades, still got hit on two big ones.

BEARISH - Liberation Day. Trump announced a 10% baseline tariff on all U.S. imports and higher duties up to 34%+ on specific countries. ES dropped ~300 points in two sessions. Nearly sat the whole month out.
BULLISH - Trump paused the worst tariffs for 90 days. Massive short squeeze, ES ripped back hard. Easy long-bias month, let trades breathe and run.
BULLISH - Continued recovery from April lows. Steady price action with good intraday structure. Focused on morning sessions and avoided overtrading.
BULLISH - Strong momentum carried through summer. Clean trending tape, high conviction setups. One of the better months of execution all year.
CHOPPY - Weak jobs data brought recession fears back. ES swung 50+ points both directions daily with no follow-through. Got chopped up trying to trade the range.
BULLISH - Fed cut rates and signaled more cuts coming. ES trended higher for weeks straight. One of the cleanest trending months of the year.
BULLISH - Strong earnings season on top of September momentum. ES ground to new highs with barely any pullbacks. Stayed patient and let trades develop.
BULLISH - Continued strength into year-end. Focused on high-probability setups, avoided getting greedy after two strong months.
FLAT - Holiday low volume. No institutions, no trend, just noise. Intentionally barely traded and preserved gains heading into 2026.
BULLISH - Clean start to 2026. Market resumed uptrend with good structure. Focused on morning momentum setups and executed well.
BEARISH - Tariff threats returned alongside soft economic data. ES broke key support levels and trended down. Almost completely sat out with only 3 trades.
BEARISH - Continued selling pressure. Trade policy uncertainty, slowing global growth, mixed Fed signals. Failed bounces all month, no sustained trend to trade.
